title: Tropical Beach Island Sky Clouds Vacation Round Rubber Non-Slip Jar Gripper Lid Opener
description:
About this item
We’ve all encountered a jar that just doesn’t want to be opened, but that’s about to change with this jar lid opener from Graphics and More
Made of rubber, with an underside featuring special gripping capabilities
Measures approximately 4.75" (12.1cm) in diameter
Includes the printed design as shown
reviews_1s: Not good at all for opening jars.
